description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI [RPI] that runs on push and pull request events for devel and release branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should have a concurrency policy that cancels in-progress runs if a newer run is started on a given PR, except for devel and release branches. The workflow consists of two jobs: RPI and RPI-Integration. The RPI job runs on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, checks out the repository, sets up the environment, installs the RPI toolchain, runs F prime CI tests, copies test artifacts, builds and uploads artifacts, and archives logs. The RPI-Integration job runs on a self-hosted raspberrypi environment, depends on the RPI job, checks out requirements, sets up the environment, downloads RPI build artifacts, runs RPI integration tests, and archives logs.
